jobs.title: Data Science Analyst
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Tatari</strong></p><p>Tatari is the dominant streaming-and-linear-TV connected-attribution advertising-analytics platform pioneered around the cross-channel incremental-lift / unique-reach measurement data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: <p>Lead Tatari's platform engineering across the streaming-TV attribution & CTV measurement ecosystem.</p>
